creator: Trond.Endrestol@ximalas.info
text:
System has WITH_DEBUG_FILES=yes set in /etc/src.conf. security/kc, and /usr/share/mk/bsd.own.mk complains loudly:

root@hostname:~ # portupgrade -fprv security/kc
--->  Session started at: Mon, 28 Mar 2016 18:40:37 +0200
[Reading data from pkg(8) ... - 624 packages found - done]
--->  Reinstallation of security/kc started at: Mon, 28 Mar 2016 18:40:37 +0200
--->  Reinstalling 'kc-2.3.2_2' (security/kc)
--->  Build of security/kc started at: Mon, 28 Mar 2016 18:40:37 +0200
--->  Building '/usr/ports/security/kc'
===>  Cleaning for kc-2.3.2_2
===>  License BSD2CLAUSE accepted by the user
===>   kc-2.3.2_2 depends on file: /usr/local/sbin/pkg - found
===> Fetching all distfiles required by kc-2.3.2_2 for building
===>  Extracting for kc-2.3.2_2
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for levaidaniel-kc-2.3.2_GH0.tar.gz.
===>  Patching for kc-2.3.2_2
===>   kc-2.3.2_2 depends on executable: pkgconf - found
===>   kc-2.3.2_2 depends on shared library: libxml2.so - found (/usr/local/lib/libxml2.so)
===>   kc-2.3.2_2 depends on shared library: libpcre.so - found (/usr/local/lib/libpcre.so)
===>   kc-2.3.2_2 depends on shared library: libedit.so.0 - found (/usr/local/lib/libedit.so.0)
===>  Configuring for kc-2.3.2_2
===>  Building for kc-2.3.2_2
make[1]: "/usr/share/mk/bsd.own.mk" line 502: WITH_DEBUG_FILES and WITHOUT_DEBUG_FILES can't both be set.
===> Compilation failed unexpectedly.
Try to set MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE=yes and rebuild before reporting the failure to
the maintainer.
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/security/kc
** Command failed [exit code 1]: /usr/bin/script -qa /tmp/portupgrade20160328-67427-69qxia env UPGRADE_TOOL=portupgrade UPGRADE_PORT=kc-2.3.2_2 UPGRADE_PORT_VER=2.3.2_2 make "DEPENDS_TARGET=install package"
** Fix the problem and try again.
--->  Build of security/kc ended at: Mon, 28 Mar 2016 18:40:38 +0200 (consumed 00:00:00)
--->  Reinstallation of security/kc ended at: Mon, 28 Mar 2016 18:40:38 +0200 (consumed 00:00:00)
--->  ** Upgrade tasks 1: 0 done, 0 ignored, 0 skipped and 1 failed
--->  Listing the results (+:done / -:ignored / *:skipped / !:failed)
        ! security/kc (kc-2.3.2_2)      (unknown build error)
--->  Packages processed: 0 done, 0 ignored, 0 skipped and 1 failed
--->  Session ended at: Mon, 28 Mar 2016 18:40:38 +0200 (consumed 00:00:01)

This happened on:

FreeBSD hostname.some.domain 10.3-PRERELEASE FreeBSD 10.3-PRERELEASE #0 r297011: Fri Mar 18 13:39:40 CET 2016     root@hostname.some.domain:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/CUSTOM_KERNEL  amd64

Quick fix:

Comment out WITH_DEBUG_FILES=yes in /etc/src.conf while (re)compiling security/kc.
